objective: Create a 6-week operating model recommendation for two overlapping engineering organizations.
context: There are duplicated roles across platform, infrastructure, and application teams.
The two teams use different technology stacks and release processes.
Employee morale is low after the merger announcement.
requirements: Map duplicated roles and critical capabilities.
Define a transition roadmap with risks and dependencies.
constraints: No layoffs can be announced before legal review.
Critical product releases cannot slip this quarter.
